title: rubus hirtus var. crassus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. crassus, also known as the thorny raspberry, is a variety of the raspberry plant that is characterized by its thorny stems and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus hirtus var. crassus include its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Rubus hirtus var. crassus include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce the risk of heart disease and certain types of cancer, as well as its ability to improve digestion and boost the immune system. Rubus hirtus var. crassus can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, sore throats, and skin irritations.
